headline: Marine Corps Enlisted Leaders Visit HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding to Advance Veteran-to-Shipbuilding Workforce Pipeline
summary: PASCAGOULA, Miss., March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII’s (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division recently welcomed senior enlisted leaders from the U.S. Marine Corps for a visit focused on strengthening pathways between Marines completing active service and long-term careers in the shipbuilding industry. headline: Why The Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Risks
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries is now modeled with a fair value price target of $403.00, up from $380.60, which brings the valuation closer to the latest analyst target range. That shift comes as research updates highlight both supportive factors, such as resolved union wage discussions and sector work pointing to higher targets, and cautious signals, including list removals and trimmed estimates tied to policy uncertainty. As you read on, you will see how these mixed opinions shape the...

headline: General Dynamics' Arm Wins a $15.38B Navy Deal for Submarine Support
summary: GD lands a $15.38B Navy contract to support Columbia-class submarines, strengthening its role in a growing global submarine market.

headline: Hegseth says potential $200 billion Iran war spending request could shift: 'Takes money to kill bad guys'
summary: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director, Kevin Hassett, said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.
